vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to the sublime topography of the northern highlands, where every cliffside offers a new perspective to photograph.

vocab.meaning: điều kiện khí quyển phù du/chóng vánh (như sương mù, mây vần)
vocab.example: Capturing views during ephemeral atmospheric conditions, like a sudden mist rolling over the hills, creates a sense of mystery in my photos.

vocab.meaning: những dải xanh ngắt bạt ngàn
vocab.example: Nothing satisfies me more than photographing the verdant expanses of rice terraces during the harvest season.
The rugged terrain of the coastline provides a dramatic contrast against the ocean, making it a perfect subject for wide-angle shots.

vocab.meaning: một tấm thảm trải nghiệm đa giác quan
vocab.example: To me, a mountain view is a sensory tapestry that I try to condense into a single, high-quality image.

vocab.meaning: sự tìm thấy đầy tình cờ và may mắn
vocab.example: Sometimes the best pictures aren't of famous landmarks but a serendipitous find down a hidden alleyway in a foreign city.
I enjoy taking pictures of skyscrapers to emphasize their monumental scale against the tiny figures of people below.

vocab.meaning: sự yên bình của cảnh làng quê
vocab.example: My camera roll is filled with shots that try to evoke the pastoral tranquility of the countryside where I grew up.

vocab.meaning: các cấu tạo địa chất vô song
vocab.example: I traveled to the stone plateau specifically to document the unrivaled geological formations found nowhere else in the world.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản hoàn toàn/gay gắt
vocab.example: I love capturing the stark contrast between the ancient temples and the neon-lit modern buildings in the background.
